P2 — Client purchase + credential-install path (new ChatCommand/FFI; StoreKit2 + Play Billing; idempotent install)

P4 — Reconciliation loop (Apple/Google pull; one-time restore-only; Stripe bot-push); @on_message credential handler
P5 — Stripe desktop: Payment Link (S6) + Customer Portal (/portal); two-message handler
Android build flavors: isolate Play Billing to the google-flavor source set (FOSS APK stays GMS-free)

note: Design split into Product Plan (UX/rules/decisions) + Implementation Plan (this). Resolve Open Decisions before coding each phase.
